top.head: 5 myths about
top.massive: Binary Options trading is surrounded with unfortunate misinformation. Today we’d like to help you sort the facts from total fiction.

main.1text: Not unless you treat it that way. Binary options trading requires an enormous amount of education, preparation and practice. If you enter this field with all of the dedication it requires, you’ll be sure to reap the benefits.
main.2titl: «It’s impossible to make profit with binary options»
main.2text: Let the numbers speak for themselves: $10 029 013.96 of profit was withdrawn by our traders in November 2016 alone.
main.3text: Not necessarily. While larger investments can naturally yield larger profit, you don’t have to go all in. There are lots of examples of people starting with a humble deposit and reaching great heights. Just check out the example below.
main.4titl: «A bonus is a trap designed to steal your money»
main.4text: While it’s true that your deposit amount does get temporarily locked for withdrawal, a bonus provides you with more funds at hand. More money =  more investment opportunities. And more opportunities means a higher chance of success.
main.5titl: «It’s impossible to profit without trading signals»
main.5text: Quite the opposite - it’s the over-reliance on trading signals and indicators that gets traders into trouble. Not to mention that a significant portion of signal providers are swindlers. It’s much wiser to use a combination of technical and economic analysis.

cta.text: Keep checking your mailbox for more pro trading tips from IQ Option to get your trading on the next level!
